statement: Build a cohesive, integrated collective intelligence symbiote that helps beings think, feel, remember, coordinate, and evolve together.
tagline: Source is the shared command, memory, and meaning surface for collective intelligence among beings.
north_star: Every meaningful interaction should leave the system more context-rich, more coordinated, more aligned, and more capable than it was before.
operating_commitments: Make important state legible across surfaces without forcing beings to reconstruct it.
Turn raw interaction into attributable memory, then into reviewed inference and better future behavior.
Preserve provenance, consent, and clear authority while increasing useful agency for every lane.
Prefer local-first orchestration and tight feedback loops where latency and continuity matter.
Measure whether the collective is genuinely getting better, not just getting busier.

pillars.label: Think
pillars.summary: Shared context, deliberate routing, and model-specific reasoning harnesses.

pillars.label: Feel
pillars.summary: Relational state, tone, urgency, and co-regulation become first-class system inputs.

pillars.label: Remember
pillars.summary: Evidence becomes durable memory, then distilled preference and personal inference.

pillars.label: Coordinate
pillars.summary: Beings share tasks, handoffs, receipts, and live operating state.

pillars.label: Evolve
pillars.summary: The system reviews itself, measures compounding gains, and improves on purpose.

tasks.title: Universal Context Packet
tasks.summary: Generate one compact, provenance-tagged context packet for Source UI, Telegram, Discord, and local agent lanes.
tasks.definition_of_done: All major surfaces render and consume the same current-state packet with recency markers, open work, active models, and human preference lines.

tasks.title: Mission Control Timeline
tasks.summary: Unify commands, model runs, handoffs, memory promotions, and sim transitions into one causally ordered event stream.
tasks.definition_of_done: An operator can answer what happened, why it happened, and what changed next from one timeline view.

tasks.title: Memory Promotion Review Queue
tasks.summary: Build a review surface for promoting raw evidence into trusted user inferences, preferences, and reusable summaries.
tasks.definition_of_done: Every durable inference has evidence links, contradiction state, confidence, and an operator review action.

tasks.title: Personal Inference Graph
tasks.summary: Move from flat prompt lines to a structured graph of preferences, aversions, rhythms, collaborators, and recurring goals.
tasks.definition_of_done: Prompt harnesses can request targeted inference packets by context instead of reloading the same generic preferences.

tasks.title: Relational State Layer
tasks.summary: Track interaction tone, overload, trust, urgency, and social context so the system can respond with more tact and less noise.
tasks.definition_of_done: Source exposes a live relational-state card and model harnesses can adapt response style from it.

tasks.title: Multi-Agent Deliberation Cells
tasks.summary: Create bounded cells where specialist lanes can deliberate, disagree, and return one attributed recommendation.
tasks.definition_of_done: Source can launch a cell with explicit roles, capture each contribution, and show the final synthesis with dissent if present.

tasks.title: Research-to-Action Distillation
tasks.summary: Turn research-channel discussions, saved links, and external feeds into actionable briefs, experiments, and queued tasks.
tasks.definition_of_done: Research messages can be promoted into experiments or tasks with source links and owner assignment in one flow.

tasks.title: Consent and Provenance Boundary Map
tasks.summary: Make it explicit what can be shared across surfaces, what stays private, and what requires human approval.
tasks.definition_of_done: Every memory and outbound action surface displays provenance and shareability state before use.

tasks.title: Weekly Evolution Loop
tasks.summary: Add a scheduled review that summarizes what the collective learned, what regressed, and what should change next.
tasks.definition_of_done: Source produces a concise weekly evolution report with wins, regressions, and top three upgrades.

tasks.title: Continuity and Recovery Pack
tasks.summary: Capture the minimum viable state needed for a clean restart after service failure, model swap, or machine interruption.
tasks.definition_of_done: A restart packet can reconstruct active work, latest decisions, memory health, and pending approvals without human re-explanation.
